name: Artifact
effect: Negates X debuffs.

name: Barricade
effect: Block is not removed at the start of turn.

name: Buffer
effect: Prevent the next X times you would lose HP.

name: Dexterity
effect: Increases Block gained from cards by X.

name: Draw Card
effect: Draw X additional cards next turn.

name: Energy
effect: Resource used to play cards. You gain Energy at the start of each turn.

name: Energized
effect: Gain X additional Energy next turn.

name: Focus
effect: Increases the effectiveness of Orbs by X.

name: Intangible
effect: Reduce ALL damage taken and HP loss to 1 this turn. (lasts X turns)

name: Mantra
effect: When you gain 10 Mantra, enter Divinity.

name: Calm
effect: While in Calm there are no stance damage modifiers. When you exit Calm, gain 2 Energy.

name: Divinity
effect: When you enter: gain 3 Energy. Your Attacks deal triple damage. Ends at end of turn.

name: Wrath
effect: Your Attacks deal double damage; you take double damage from enemy Attacks.

name: Metallicize
effect: At the end of your/its turn, gain X Block.

name: Next Turn Block
effect: Gain X Block next turn.

name: Plated Armor
effect: At the end of your turn, gain X Block. Receiving unblocked attack damage reduces Plated Armor by 1.

name: Regenerate
effect: At the end of its turn, heals X HP.

name: Ritual
effect: At the end of its turn, gains X Strength.

name: Strength
effect: Increases attack damage by X.

name: Thorns
effect: When attacked, deals X damage back.

name: Vigor
effect: Your next Attack deals X additional damage.

name: Accuracy
effect: Shivs deal X additional damage.

name: After Image
effect: Whenever you play a card, gain X Block.

name: Amplify
effect: Your next X Power cards are played twice.

name: Battle Hymn
effect: At the start of each turn add X Smites into your hand.

name: Berserk
effect: At the start of your turn, gain X Energy.

name: Blasphemer
effect: At the start of your turn, die.

name: Blur
effect: Block is not removed at the start of your next X turns.

name: Brutality
effect: At the start of your turn, lose X HP and draw X cards.

name: Burst
effect: Your next X Skills are played twice.

name: Collect
effect: Put a Miracle+ into your hand at the start of your next X turns.

name: Combust
effect: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP(for each Combust played) and deal X damage to ALL enemies.

name: Corruption
effect: Skills cost 0. Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.

name: Creative AI
effect: At the start of your turn, add X random Power cards into your hand.

name: Dark Embrace
effect: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw X cards.

name: Demon Form
effect: At the start of your turn, gain X Strength.

name: Deva
effect: At the start of your turn gain Energy N times and increase this gain by X.

name: Devotion
effect: At the start of your turn, gain X Mantra.

name: Double Damage
effect: Attacks deal double damage for X turns.

name: Double Tap
effect: Your next X Attacks are played twice.

name: Duplication
effect: Your next X cards are played twice.

name: Echo Form
effect: The first X cards you play each turn are played twice.

name: Electro
effect: Lightning hits ALL enemies.

name: Envenom
effect: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply X Poison.

name: Equilibrium
effect: Retain your hand for X turns.

name: Establishment
effect: Whenever a card is Retained, lower its cost by X.

name: Evolve
effect: Whenever you draw a Status, draw X cards.

name: Feel No Pain
effect: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain X Block.

name: Fire Breathing
effect: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

name: Flame Barrier
effect: When attacked, deals X damage back. Wears off at the start of your next turn.

name: Foresight
effect: At the start of your turn, Scry X.

name: Free Attack Power
effect: The next X Attacks you play costs 0.

name: Heatsink
effect: Whenever you play a Power card, draw X cards.

name: Hello
effect: At the start of your turn, add X random Common cards into your hand.

name: Infinite Blades
effect: At the start of your turn, add X Shivs into your hand.

name: Juggernaut
effect: Whenever you gain Block, deal X damage to a random enemy.

name: Like Water
effect: At the end of your turn, if you are in Calm, gain X Block.

name: Loop
effect: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Orb X times.

name: Machine Learning
effect: At the start of your turn, draw X additional cards.

name: Magnetism
effect: At the start of your turn, add X random colorless cards into your hand.

name: Master Reality
effect: Whenever a card is created during combat, Upgrade it.

name: Mayhem
effect: At the start of your turn, play the top X card of your draw pile.

name: Mental Fortress
effect: Whenever you switch Stances, gain X Block.

name: Nightmare
effect: Add X of a chosen card into your hand next turn.

name: Nirvana
effect: Whenever you Scry, gain X Block.

name: Noxious Fumes
effect: At the start of your turn, apply X Poison to ALL enemies.

name: Omega
effect: At the end of your turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

name: Panache
effect: If you play N more cards this turn, deal X damage to all enemies.

name: Pen Nib
effect: Your next Attack deals double damage.

name: Phantasmal
effect: Deal Double Damage for the next X turns.

name: Rage
effect: Whenever you play an Attack, gain X Block.

name: Rebound
effect: The next X cards you play this turn are placed on top of your draw pile.

name: Regeneration
effect: At the end of your turn, heal X HP and reduce Regen by 1.

name: Rushdown
effect: Whenever you enter Wrath, draw X cards.

name: Repair
effect: At the end of combat, heal X HP.

name: Rupture
effect: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain X Strength.

name: Sadistic
effect: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, deal X damage.

name: Simmering Rage
effect: At the start of your next turn, enter Wrath.

name: Static Discharge
effect: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, channel X Lightning.

name: Storm
effect: Whenever you play a Power card, channel X Lightning.

name: Study
effect: At the end of your turn, shuffle X Insights into your draw pile.

name: Surrounded
effect: Receive 50% more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

name: The Bomb
effect: At the end of N turns, deal X damage to all enemies.

name: Thousand Cuts
effect: Whenever you play a card, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

name: Tools of the Trade
effect: At the start of your turn, draw X cards and discard X cards.

name: Wave of the Hand
effect: Whenever you gain Block this turn, apply X Weak to ALL enemies.

name: Well-Laid Plans
effect: At the end of your turn, Retain up to X cards.

name: Angry
effect: Upon receiving attack damage, gains X Strength.

name: Back Attack
effect: Deals 50% more damage as it is attacking you from behind.

name: Beat of Death
effect: Whenever you play a card, take X damage.

name: Curiosity
effect: Whenever you play a Power card, gains X Strength.

name: Curl Up
effect: On receiving attack damage, rolls up and gains X Block (Once per combat).

name: Enrage
effect: Whenever you play a skill, gains X Strength.

name: Explosive
effect: Explodes in N turns, dealing X damage.

name: Fading
effect: Dies in X turns.

name: Invincible
effect: Can only lose X more HP this turn.

name: Life Link
effect: If other Darklings are still alive, revives in 2 turns.

name: Malleable
effect: Upon receiving attack damage, gains X Block. Block gain increases by 1 each time Malleable is triggered. Resets to X at the start of your turn.

name: Minion
effect: Minions abandon combat without their leader.

name: Mode Shift
effect: After receiving X damage, changes to a defensive mode.

name: Painful Stabs
effect: Whenever you receive attack damage from this enemy, add X Wounds into your discard pile.

name: Reactive
effect: Upon receiving attack damage, changes its intent.

name: Sharp Hide
effect: Whenever you play an attack, take X damage.

name: Shifting
effect: Upon losing HP, loses that much Strength until the end of the turn.

name: Split
effect: When its HP is at or below 50%, will split into 2 smaller Slimes with its current HP.

name: Spore Cloud
effect: On death, applies X Vulnerable.

name: Stasis
effect: On death, a stolen card is returned to your hand.

name: Strength Up
effect: At the end of its turn, gains X Strength.

name: Thievery
effect: Steals X Gold whenever it attacks.

name: Time Warp
effect: Whenever you play N cards, ends your turn and gains X Strength.

name: Unawakened
effect: This enemy hasn't awakened yet...

name: Confused
effect: The costs of your cards are randomized on draw, from 0 to 3.

name: Dexterity (Negative)
effect: Decreases Block gained from cards by X.

name: Dexterity Down
effect: At the end of your turn, lose X Dexterity.

name: Focus (Negative)
effect: Decreases the effectiveness of your Orbs by X.

name: Frail
effect: Block gained from cards is reduced by 25%.

name: No Draw
effect: You may not draw any more cards this turn.

name: Poison
effect: At the start of its turn, lose X HP (bypasses Block); then lose 1 stack of Poison.

name: Shackled
effect: At the end of its turn, regains X Strength.

name: Slow
effect: The enemy receives (X*10)% more damage from attacks this turn. Whenever you play a card, increases X by 1.

name: Strength (Negative)
effect: Decreases attack damage by X.

name: Strength Down
effect: At the end of your turn, lose X Strength.

name: Vulnerable
effect: Target takes 50% more damage from attacks.

name: Weak
effect: Target deals 25% less attack damage.

name: Bias
effect: At the start of your turn, lose X Focus.

name: Block Return
effect: Whenever you attack this enemy, gain X Block.

name: Choked
effect: Whenever you play a card this turn, the targeted enemy loses X HP.

name: Constricted
effect: At the end of your turn, take X damage.

name: Corpse Explosion
effect: On death, the enemy deals X times its Max HP worth of damage to all other enemies.

name: Draw Reduction
effect: Draw 1 less card next X turns.

name: Entangled
effect: You may not play any Attacks this turn.

name: Fasting
effect: Gain X less Energy at the start of each turn.

name: Hex
effect: Whenever you play a non-Attack card, add X Dazed to your draw pile.

name: Lock-On
effect: Lightning and Dark orbs deal 50% more damage (rounded down) to the targeted enemy.

name: Mark
effect: Whenever you play Pressure Points, all enemies with Mark lose X HP.

name: No Block
effect: You may not gain Block from cards for the next X turns.

name: Wraith Form
effect: Lose X Dexterity at the end of your turn.
